MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John P. Zanghi, Esq., appeared on behalf of plaintiff the John Stewart Company. Defendant did not appear.

Plaintiff's counsel represented that this matter has settled. Settlement Conference ordered Off Calendar. Trial date vacated.

Hon. William R. Gargano. Clerk Garth Sayers, Not Reported
